Update to Country-Specific Guidelines and Instructions, Form 3597
We
updated the Description of Warning, Sanction, and Country Advice section in the Country Specific Guidelines and Instructions, Form 3597, for Tax Haven/High-Risk and Prohibited countries. These changes were also made in the Wires application and the Money Transfer System (MTS).

We updated the message wording for Tax Haven and/or High-Risk countries to: âPlease be aware that [Country Name] falls under Tax Haven and/or High-Risk Country List. Financial institutions are encouraged to consider these risks before submitting transactions, and to conduct enhanced due diligence as requiredâ.
We updated the message wording for Prohibited countries to: âAs a result of correspondent bank policy and Canadian laws applicable to transactions involving [Country Name], wire transfers to and from this country will be rejected, and the responsible credit union will be notifiedâ.
We added a Purpose of Payment message for St. Lucia.
We added the following message for United Arab Emirates: âA TTC purpose code consistent with reason for payment is requiredâ.
